diagrams.title: McCall Quality Model
diagrams.description: Shows the 11 quality factors organized in three categories
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the complete McCall quality model structure and relationships between factors

diagrams.title: ISO 9126 Quality Characteristics
diagrams.description: Six primary quality characteristics and their sub-characteristics
elements: Functionality (Suitability, Accuracy, Interoperability, Security, Functionality compliance)
diagrams.purpose: Understand the hierarchical structure of ISO 9126 quality characteristics

diagrams.title: QA vs QC Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how QA and QC activities integrate in software development
diagrams.purpose: Understand the complementary nature of QA and QC in software projects

diagrams.title: ISO 9126 vs ISO 25010 Evolution
diagrams.description: Comparison showing new characteristics added in ISO 25010
elements: Common: Functionality→Functional suitability, Usability, Reliability, Efficiency, Maintainability, Portability
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the evolution from ISO 9126 to ISO 25010 standard

visuals.title: Defining Software Quality
visuals.description: Visual diagram for defining software quality
